name: fidelity-studio-content-assistant
description: Use Codex with the Fidelity Studio Content Assistant for authenticated client website content.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, translate, preview, and publish client website content.
interface.longDescription: Adds the Fidelity Studio Content Assistant MCP endpoint for drafting, translating, previewing, and publishing authenticated client website content. Client-specific guidance is returned by the MCP server after sign-in, not bundled in this public plugin.
defaultPrompt: Show me my content assistant project context.
List the content tools I can use.
Help me draft a website update.
